title: Jay Rowe and F-CNFAIC Present: 20 Years to the Summit
summary: Please join us for Jay Rowe's 20 year quest to climb all 5 of the major peaks of the Moose's Tooth massif in the mighty Alaska Range: Broken Tooth, Bear Tooth, Eye Tooth, Sugar Tooth and of course, the Mooses Tooth.
